uplink.description: Typical pressure data (fPort 10, Pressure/Float devtype 0x1321): 1.009334683418274 Bar -> pressure.gauge 100.933 kPa, temp 28.87 C, battery 99%
uplink._note: Upstream universal_decoder DecodeSinglePoint returns the main value as a big-endian float32 in Bar (1.009334683418274) and temp '28.87'; bat 99. We normalize Bar->kPa (x100, round 3dp), temp int16/100->air.temperature, bat->batteryPercent. Verified by running reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: Synthetic: status ok, sub-zero temperature (-5.12 C) and 2.5 Bar -> pressure.gauge 250 kPa
uplink._note: devtype 0x1321 (Pressure/Float), cnt 0x012C=300, status 0x00=ok, bat 87%, temp int16BE 0xFE00=-512 /100=-5.12 C, pressure float32BE 0x40200000=2.5 Bar x100=250 kPa.

uplink.description: Error: unsupported fPort (firmware-revision frame on fPort 2 is not a measurement)
uplink._note: Only the fPort-10 single-point pressure frame is normalized.

uplink.description: Error: payload too short for the 12-byte single-point frame
uplink._note: Single-point frame requires at least 12 bytes.

uplink.description: Error: non-pressure devtype (0x1222 Temperature sensor) yields no calibrated pressure
uplink._note: devtype 0x1222 -> Sensor=Temperature; this codec emits a calibrated pressure only for Pressure-sensor frames.
